en: And I thought what I felt was simple.
And I thought that I don't belong
And now that I am leaving, now I know that I did something wrong
ko: 이제 떠나려 하니 내가 뭔가 잘못했음을 알게 되었어.

en: Cause I missed you, yeah, I missed you.
And you say, I only hear what I want to
ko: 너는 내가 원하는 것만 듣는다고 말해.

en: I don't listen hard, don't pay attention to the distance that you're running
ko: 나는 잘 듣지 않고, 주의도 기울이지 않아. 네가 달려가는 거리도.

en: To anyone, anywhere, I don't understand
If you really care, I'm only hearing negative.
ko: 네가 정말 신경 쓴다면, 나는 부정적인 것만 듣고 있어.

en: So I turn the radio on, I turn the radio on.
And this woman was singing my song
ko: 그리고 이 여자가 내 노래를 부르고 있었어.

en: Lovers in love and the others run away.
ko: 사랑하는 사람들은 사랑에 빠지고, 다른 사람들은 도망가.
